grant_and_term.grant: Non-exclusive license to operate a single Great Clips salon at a designated Authorized Location
grant_and_term.term: 10 years from date of salon opening
grant_and_term.term_for_purchasers: Balance of the term of the agreement for the existing salon
grant_and_term.opening_deadline: 24 months from date Great Clips accepts Franchise Agreement
grant_and_term.cancellation_right: Great Clips may cancel if salon not opened within 24 months, training not completed, or speculative use

fee_obligations.continuing_franchise_fee: 6% of Gross Sales, biweekly via ACH
fee_obligations.ad_fund_contribution: 5% of Gross Sales, biweekly via ACH
fee_obligations.late_charges: 14% per annum or highest rate allowed by law
fee_obligations.cost_recovery: Great Clips may recover reasonable attorneys' fees, costs, overdraft charges

site_selection_and_construction.site_responsibility: Franchisee solely responsible for locating, obtaining, evaluating suitability
site_selection_and_construction.construction_requirements: Must build to Great Clips facility standards with licensed architect drawings

training_obligations.designated_operator_deadline: 180 days from signing or becoming Designated Operator
training_obligations.retraining_right: Great Clips may require re-attendance at any time
training_obligations.renewal_retraining: May be required as condition of renewal
training_obligations.expenses: Franchisee pays all wages, travel, expenses for self and employees

operational_obligations.email_review: At least once per business day, respond within 24 hours
operational_obligations.data_access: Great Clips has independent, unimpeded, complete access to all salon data
operational_obligations.data_ownership: All salon data is proprietary property of Great Clips
operational_obligations.operations_manual_compliance: Mandatory; subject to change by Great Clips

triggers: Impairment of Marks/System (including serious health/safety violation)
Unable to pay debts / assignment for benefit of creditors
Abandonment or closure for 3+ consecutive days without approval

curable_defaults.notice: Notice of termination may be given simultaneously with notice of default, subject to cure right

repeated_breaches.trigger: Repeated breaches or material breach incapable of cure

assignee_requirements: Agree to operate as Great Clips salon
Not a competitor of Great Clips
Will devote best efforts to management
Sign then-current franchise agreement (for balance of original term)
transfer_restrictions.cannot_transfer_if_salon_closed: Except when selling all salons and leaving system

right_of_first_refusal.notice_period: 60 days to match bona fide offer
right_of_first_refusal.matching_basis: Price and terms or cash equivalent
right_of_first_refusal.closing_deadline: Transaction must close within 120 days of GC not exercising ROFR
right_of_first_refusal.changed_offer: Must be re-presented to Great Clips

during_term.scope: All haircare, grooming, beauty school, barber school, cosmetology school, hair product businesses
during_term.ownership_exception: 1% or less of publicly traded corporation

post_term.geographic_scope: 5 miles from Authorized Location or any Great Clips salon

noncompete.retail_haircare_business_definition: Any service on GC price board, related products, blow drying/styling, braiding, treatments, perms
noncompete.burden_of_proof: Franchisee bears burden to prove non-violation if conducting competitive business

guaranty.scope: Every shareholder with ANY equity interest
guaranty.type: Personal guaranty of complete and timely performance of ALL franchisee obligations

liquidated_damages.note: No liquidated damages clause identified in the Franchise Agreement text.

dispute_resolution.arbitration_rules: Then-current rules of the American Arbitration Association
dispute_resolution.litigation_venue: Hennepin County, Minnesota (federal or state court)
dispute_resolution.personal_jurisdiction: Franchisee submits to personal jurisdiction in Minnesota
dispute_resolution.prevailing_party_fees: Prevailing party entitled to costs and reasonable attorneys' fees

insurance_requirements.cancellation_notice: 30 days advance notice to Great Clips

indemnification.scope: Broad — all claims arising from franchisee's operation

force_majeure.note: No explicit force majeure clause identified in the extracted Franchise Agreement text.

distinctive_clauses.detail: Franchisee may not use Confidential Information for machine learning, AI training, or similar activities without express written consent. Cannot input into generative AI platforms. Must opt out of AI providers using data for training.

distinctive_clauses.clause: Customer Data as Great Clips Property
distinctive_clauses.detail: All salon data (sales, financial, marketing, customer, productivity, management, operational) is proprietary property of Great Clips. Franchisee has only a limited license during term.
Both parties waive right to punitive damages and jury trial. Subject to state law overrides.
Closing salon for 3 consecutive days (excluding designated holidays) without prior written approval constitutes abandonment and grounds for immediate termination.
